current_stage: v3.0 software-side sphere AI foundation completed

major_milestones.name: Knowledge Foundation
major_milestones.summary: Knowledge Core, Source Registry, World Update, Paper Intake, Knowledge Search, Digest, Cleanup, Trust, Answer, Auto Recall foundation completed.

major_milestones.name: Release Snapshot
major_milestones.summary: Knowledge foundation release snapshot saved in docs.

major_milestones.name: Backup / Export
major_milestones.summary: Local backups and knowledge exports are available.

major_milestones.name: Command Help
major_milestones.summary: Grouped command help is available inside NEXUS.

major_milestones.name: Major Command Test Suite
major_milestones.summary: Major command tests pass with PASS 15 / FAIL 0.

major_milestones.name: System Health v2
major_milestones.summary: System Health now shows Recommended Fixes.

major_milestones.name: Project Memory v2
major_milestones.summary: Project memory can now update current stage, next stage, and milestones safely.

major_milestones.name: Safe Refactor Project Memory
major_milestones.summary: Project Memory v2 patch was integrated into the class safely.

major_milestones.name: Command Help v2
major_milestones.summary: Command help was updated for v0.5 with research, import, project memory, and development commands.

major_milestones.name: Memory Answer v1
major_milestones.summary: NEXUS can now answer current-position, next-action, v0.6 status, and memory status questions using Project Memory, Knowledge Core, and Work Notes.

major_milestones.name: v0.7 Release Snapshot
major_milestones.summary: File Index v1, File Preview v1, UI Preparation v1, Production Support v1, Version Display Sync v1, and Release Snapshot v0.7 completed. Test Suite PASS 74 / FAIL 0.

major_milestones.name: v0.8 Release Snapshot
major_milestones.summary: Dashboard Backend v1, Frontend v1, Status Panel v1, File Panel v1, Production Panel v1, Launch Command v1, and Release Snapshot v0.8 completed. Test Suite PASS 77 / FAIL 0.

major_milestones.name: v0.9 Release Snapshot
major_milestones.summary: Integrated Dashboard Test v1, System Stability Check v1, Dashboard Safety Review v1, Release Readiness Checklist v1, and Release Snapshot v0.9 completed. Major Command Test PASS 77 / FAIL 0.

major_milestones.name: v1.0 Release Snapshot
major_milestones.summary: Project NEXUS v1.0 completed as a practical daily-use local assistant foundation. Planning, whole-project review, daily-use readiness docs, dashboard launch flow, daily assistant workflow, command review, and release snapshot were completed.

major_milestones.name: v1.1 Daily Command Refinement
major_milestones.summary: Defined daily command refinement direction for practical use.

major_milestones.summary: Defined dashboard refinement direction while preserving safety.

major_milestones.name: v1.3 File Panel Refinement
major_milestones.summary: Defined important file and panel refinement direction.

major_milestones.name: v1.4 Production Note Refinement
major_milestones.summary: Defined creative and 3DCG production note improvement direction.

major_milestones.name: v1.5 Voice Preparation
major_milestones.summary: Defined voice preparation and safety boundaries without implementing voice I/O.

major_milestones.name: v2.0 Release Snapshot
major_milestones.summary: Completed sphere AI device design foundation, including hardware architecture, software architecture, safety policy, and v2.0 release snapshot.
